chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-878 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 20.10.2025 Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G Sindh ******** Mr. Sadam Khaskheli, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Muhammad Asad Shahani,, Advocate for applicants, requests time, stating that the latter is out of station. To come up on 21.10.2025 at 8:30 a.m. Late Diary 20.10.2025 Before signing the Order, it is now 11:40 a.m., Counsel for the applicant appeared and submits that he no longer wishes to proceed with this bail application, as the accused has been acquitted by the trial Court. Accordingly, bail application is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
